_comment: claude-herald config — edit directly or use: herald.ps1 --help

voice.name: Microsoft David Desktop
voice._note_rate: Range: -10 (slowest) to 10 (fastest). -2 gives a deliberate, measured cadence.
voice._note_voices: Run: Get-InstalledVoices.ps1 to list voices on your system.

toast._note: show_tool_events: true = toast for every Write/Edit/Bash. Can get noisy.

mobile._note: Set ntfy_topic to your unique topic (e.g. 'sharat-claude-abc123'). push_on_complete: push even on task-done (not just attention-needed).

announcements._note: tool_details: true = 'File written — Skills.md' vs just 'File written'
